title: Epoxy Floors for Theme Parks - Elite South Texas
content:
Theme Parks
Our theme park flooring systems are specialty engineered surfaces for indoor and outdoor commercial applications. These durable coatings are built to withstand heavy traffic while being easy to maintain. The customized surfaces match any design element or meet specific branding and color requirements.
Advantages
Options for interior and exterior surfaces
Customizable, aesthetically appealing surfaces
Flooring systems for new or existing construction
Easy to maintain
Exterior solutions withstand year-round weather
Antimicrobial and antibacterial options
Adjustable coefficient of friction ranges
Chemical and stain resistant
Polymer Modified Cement
